results.title: Is Brazil v Haiti on TV? Channel, kick-off time and how to watch World Cup 2026 match
results.description: Brazil face Group C minnows Haiti and need a win after drawing their opening match to Morocco

results.title: Clark runs hot at fog-hit US Open as Aussies flounder
results.description: Wyndham Clark has tamed treacherous Shinnecock Hills to earn himself a huge opportunity to win a second US Open crown.

results.title: I,Nobody - Official Tamil Trailer
results.description: Watch the Official Trailer from Tamil movie 'I,Nobody' starring Prithviraj Sukumaran, Parvathy Thiruvothu, Hakkim Shahjahan and Ashokan. 'I,Nobody' movie is directed by Nisam Basheer and produced by Supriya Menon, Mukesh R Mehta and CV Sarathi. To know more about 'I,Nobody' trailer watch the video. Check out the latest Tamil trailers, new movie trailers, trending Tamil movie trailers, and more at ETimes - Times of India Entertainment.

results.title: Brazil's Record Goalscorer Never Played A World Cup Final
results.description: For most footballers, becoming your country's all-time leading scorer would be enough to guarantee a place among the game's immortals.
